character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: Engaged in a physical confrontation with Israel Hands on a ship's deck, climbed rigging to evade attack, and reloaded pistols during the struggle.

character_dossiers.name: Israel Hands
character_dossiers.biography: Attempted to ambush Jim with a dirk, climbed rigging after being thrown overboard, and engaged in verbal confrontation with Jim.

character_dossiers.name: the coxswain
character_dossiers.biography: Suffered a blow from Israel Hands, lost grip on rigging, and fell overboard into the water.
